nasb.text: I will give thanks to You, O Lord, among the peoples; I will sing praises to You among the nations.

esv.text: I will give thanks to you, O Lord, among the peoples; I will sing praises to you among the nations.

cnv.text: 主啊！我要在萬民中稱謝你， 在萬族中歌頌你。

ccb.text: 主啊，我要在列邦称谢你， 在列国歌颂你。

csbs.text: 主啊，我要在万民中称谢你， 在万族中歌颂你！
